use_cases: Display team members or collaborators in a compact overlapping layout
Show multiple user profiles with interactive hover tooltips containing names and designations
Create attribution displays for articles, posts, or projects
Build contact or contributor lists with minimal space usage
Add social proof elements showing multiple users or reviewers
ai_summary: A reusable avatar group component that displays multiple user avatars in a stacked, overlapping layout with negative margins. Built with Framer Motion, it reveals animated tooltips on hover showing each user's name and designation. Supports three size variants (sm/md/lg) and customizable maximum visible avatars. Ideal for displaying teams, contributors, or social proof in SaaS, fintech, and collaboration applications.
